svg.title: Biza onboarding flow — persona, mindset, and app walkthrough
svg.desc: Full onboarding sequence from welcome through persona quiz, mindset shift, reality check, to app walkthrough and learning path
svg.text: BIZA ONBOARDING — 4 PHASES · one-time · skippable after phase 1

g.text: Phase 2 — Persona Quiz (3 questions · answers shape your learning path)
Q1: "What's your main goal right now?"
A) I need a side income alongside my job/school
B) I want to go fully online as my main income
D) I want to build a business
Q2: "What do you have more of right now?"
D) I have a skill I want to monetise
Q3: "Have you tried making money online before?"
B) Tried but got scammed or failed
C) Made a little but not consistent
D) Yes and I want to level up
Starter · Side-hustler · Skilled · Returning learner — shown as a "Your path starts here" card
Phase 3 — Mindset + Reality Check (the most important part of Biza)
Mindset quiz (2–3 questions · not graded · just reflective)
"If someone promises you KES 50,000 in 3 days for a KES 2,000 fee — what do you do?"
Phase 4 — App walkthrough + Learning Path reveal
Enter the app — home dashboard with recommended first course
Onboarding marked complete. Can be revisited from profile settings.

svg.text: Total onboarding: ~3–5 min · phases 2–4 skippable on return visits · persona stored, powers home personalisation
Phase 3 (mindset) is Biza's differentiator — no other Kenyan edtech platform does this honestly.
